function_naming.description: Use descriptive verb-noun patterns for functions

error_messages.description: Error messages should be user-friendly and actionable
error_messages.pattern: What went wrong + how to fix it

api_design.description: RESTful API endpoints should follow consistent patterns

division_by_zero.solution: Check if denominator === 0 and throw appropriate error

null_undefined_checks.solution: Use typeof checks and default parameters

coding_standards.comment_style: Use JSDoc for functions, inline comments for complex logic
coding_standards.variable_declarations: Use const by default, let only when reassignment is needed
